command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Send a real test, then read the ACTUAL logs ==="
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/sendMessage" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chat_id":"-1003934415467","text":"Sakura, reply with one word: online"}' >/dev/null
echo "test sent, waiting 30s..."
sleep 30

echo ""
echo "=== gateway.log (last 25) ==="
tail -25 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== agent.log (last 20) ==="
tail -20 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/agent.log 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== errors.log (last 20) ==="
tail -20 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/errors.log 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== gateway-exit-diag.log (last 10) ==="
tail -10 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway-exit-diag.log 2>/dev/null
REMOTE
